headline: Is It Time To Reconsider Paramount Skydance (PSKY) After Recent Share Price Swings?
summary: If you are wondering whether Paramount Skydance is attractively priced after its recent volatility, the key question is what you are really getting for each dollar of the current US$10.82 share price. The stock has moved sharply in the short term, with a 17.0% gain over the last 7 days, a 3.3% decline over 30 days and a 17.9% decline year to date that sits on top of a weak 3 and 5 year return profile. These moves sit against a backdrop of ongoing industry attention on media and entertainment...
